title: Search Relevance Built Into the Vector Index
summary: Qdrant released Query API 1.17.0 with built-in relevance feedback mechanisms for vector search. The feature enables injecting relevance signals directly into the vector index and building adaptive, feedback-driven retrieval systems beyond reranking. The implementation is demonstrated via tutorial for semantic search over documentation.
